items.title: Dow on Pace to Clear 48,000 Closing Milestone
items.description: The Dow is surging through the 48,000 threshold.  The blue-chip index was up 344 points, or 0.7%, on Wednesday.  It continued to beat the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite this week; the S&P was down 0.1%, while the Nasdaq was down 0.6%.

items.title: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Travelers Companies Stock?
items.description: Are Wall Street analysts bullish or bearish on Travelers Companies stock?

items.title: AIZ Stock Near 52-Week High: A Signal for Investors to Hold Tight?
items.description: Assurant rides on growth in capital-light businesses, Connected Living, and Global Housing, supported by solid cash flow and strategic capital deployment.
